Event: Magic Well - March 2024
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR26


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Emerald Skin Gear

Once in a while, the unit throws grenades at 2 enemies with the highest damage. The grenade deals 200000 physical damage and 200% of the armor wearer's attack and turns the enemy to stone for 3 sec. During this time, the enemy can't move and takes 30% more damage.

Requirements: 98-100
